title: platanthera obtusata f. collectanea
intro: Platanthera obtusata f. collectanea, also known as the downy orchid, is a subspecies of the Platanthera obtusata plant, which is native to North America. The medicinal properties of the downy orchid include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the downy orchid include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the downy orchid can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
